en: Then the LORD answered Job out of the whirlwind and said:
zh: 那時，耶和華在旋風中回答約伯，說：

en: "Who is this that darkens counsel by words without knowledge?
zh: “這以無知無識的言語， 使我的旨意暗晦不明的是誰呢？

en: Dress for action like a man; I will question you, and you make it known to me.
zh: 現在你要如勇士束腰， 我要問你，你要告訴我。

en: "Where were you when I laid the foundation of the earth? Tell me, if you have understanding.
zh: 我奠定大地根基的時候，你在哪裡呢？ 你若有聰明，就只管說吧。

en: Who determined its measurements- surely you know! Or who stretched the line upon it?
zh: 你一定曉得是誰定大地的尺度， 是誰把準繩拉在大地之上？

en: On what were its bases sunk, or who laid its cornerstone,
zh: 地的基礎奠在哪裡， 地的角石是誰安放的？

en: when the morning stars sang together and all the sons of God shouted for joy?
zh: 那時晨星一起歌唱， 神的眾子也都歡呼。

en: "Or who shut in the sea with doors when it burst out from the womb,
zh: 海水沖出如嬰孩出母胎， 那時誰用門把海水關閉呢？

en: when I made clouds its garment and thick darkness its swaddling band,
zh: 是我以雲彩當作海的衣服， 以幽暗當作包裹海的布；

en: and prescribed limits for it and set bars and doors,
zh: 我為海定界限， 又安置門閂和門戶，

en: and said, 'Thus far shall you come, and no farther, and here shall your proud waves be stayed'?
zh: 說：‘你只可到這裡，不可越過， 你狂傲的波浪要在這裡止住。’

en: "Have you commanded the morning since your days began, and caused the dawn to know its place,
zh: 自你有生以來，你何曾吩咐過晨光照耀， 使黎明的曙光知道自己的本位，

en: that it might take hold of the skirts of the earth, and the wicked be shaken out of it?
zh: 叫這光照遍大地的四極， 把惡人從那裡抖掉呢？

en: It is changed like clay under the seal, and its features stand out like a garment.
zh: 因著這光，地面改變如在泥上蓋上印， 萬象顯出如衣服一樣。

en: From the wicked their light is withheld, and their uplifted arm is broken.
zh: 惡人必得不到亮光， 高舉的膀臂必被折斷。

en: "Have you entered into the springs of the sea, or walked in the recesses of the deep?
zh: 你曾到過海的泉源， 在深淵的底處行走過嗎？

en: Have the gates of death been revealed to you, or have you seen the gates of deep darkness?
zh: 死亡的門曾向你顯露嗎？ 死蔭的門你曾見過嗎？

en: Have you comprehended the expanse of the earth? Declare, if you know all this.
zh: 地的廣闊，你明白嗎？ 你若完全知道，就只管說吧。

en: "Where is the way to the dwelling of light, and where is the place of darkness,
zh: 哪條是到光明居所的道路？ 黑暗的本位在哪裡？

en: that you may take it to its territory and that you may discern the paths to its home?
zh: 你能把光與暗帶到它們的境地嗎？ 你曉得通到它們居所的路嗎？

en: You know, for you were born then, and the number of your days is great!
zh: 你是知道的，因為那時你已經出生了， 你一生的日數也很多。

en: "Have you entered the storehouses of the snow, or have you seen the storehouses of the hail,
zh: 你曾入過雪庫， 或見過雹倉嗎？

en: which I have reserved for the time of trouble, for the day of battle and war?
zh: 這些雪雹是我為降患難的時候， 為打仗和爭戰的日子所存留的。

en: What is the way to the place where the light is distributed, or where the east wind is scattered upon the earth?
zh: 光從哪條路散開， 東風從哪裡分散在地上？

en: "Who has cleft a channel for the torrents of rain and a way for the thunderbolt,
zh: 誰為大雨分水道， 誰為雷電定道路？

en: to bring rain on a land where no man is, on the desert in which there is no man,
zh: 使雨降在無人之地， 落在無人居住的曠野，

en: to satisfy the waste and desolate land, and to make the ground sprout with grass?
zh: 使荒廢之地得著滋潤， 使青草在乾旱之地得以長起來呢？

en: "Has the rain a father, or who has begotten the drops of dew?
zh: 雨有父親嗎？ 露珠是誰生的呢？

en: From whose womb did the ice come forth, and who has given birth to the frost of heaven?
zh: 冰出自誰的胎？ 天上的霜是誰所生的呢？

en: The waters become hard like stone, and the face of the deep is frozen.
zh: 眾水堅硬如石頭， 深淵的表面凍結成冰。

en: "Can you bind the chains of the Pleiades or loose the cords of Orion?
zh: 你能繫住昴星的結嗎？ 你能解開參星的帶嗎？

en: Can you lead forth the Mazzaroth1 in their season, or can you guide the Bear with its children?
zh: 你能按時領出瑪查魯夫星系嗎？ 你能引導北斗和隨從它的眾星嗎？

en: Do you know the ordinances of the heavens? Can you establish their rule on the earth?
zh: 你曉得天的定例嗎？ 你能在地上建立天的權威嗎？

en: "Can you lift up your voice to the clouds, that a flood of waters may cover you?
zh: 你能向密雲揚聲嗎？ 你能使洪水淹沒你嗎？

en: Can you send forth lightnings, that they may go and say to you, 'Here we are'?
zh: 你能差派閃電，閃電就發出， 並且對你說：‘我們在這裡’嗎？

en: Who has put wisdom in the inward parts or given understanding to the mind?
zh: 誰把智慧放在懷裡， 或把聰明賜於人的心中？

en: Who can number the clouds by wisdom? Or who can tilt the waterskins of the heavens,
zh: 塵土融合成團， 土塊黏結在一起的時候，

en: when the dust runs into a mass and the clods stick fast together?
zh: 誰能憑智慧數算雲天呢？ 誰能把天上的水袋傾倒呢？

en: "Can you hunt the prey for the lion, or satisfy the appetite of the young lions,
zh: 獅子在洞中蹲伏， 在藏身之處躺臥埋伏的時候，

en: when they crouch in their dens or lie in wait in their thicket?
zh: 你能為母獅獵取食物嗎？ 你能使食慾飽足嗎？

en: Who provides for the raven its prey, when its young ones cry to God for help, and wander about for lack of food?
zh: 烏鴉雛鳥因缺乏食物飛來飛去， 向 神哀求的時候， 誰為烏鴉預備食物呢？”
